title: The Human-Centered AI Framework
description: A visual representation of the iterative and cyclical framework for developing AI systems that prioritize human needs, values, and oversight throughout the entire lifecycle.
relationships: Human Needs & Values informs and is the foundation for Design & Development
Design & Development leads to Deployment & Monitoring in real-world contexts
Deployment & Monitoring generates Feedback & Iteration from human users
Feedback & Iteration refines the system, going back to Design & Development
Governance & Ethics surrounds the entire cycle, ensuring accountability and fairness
